The '''Whistler's Whirlpool''' was a [[Tapcafe/Legends|tapcafe]] in the [[Drinking Cup]] on [[Trogan/Legends|Trogan]], near the city of [[Kergara]]. It was designed and built by an [[Ortolan/Legends|Ortolan]] known as [[Whistler (Ortolan)|Whistler]].

During the time of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Old Republic]], the cafe was very popular, but it eventually fell on hard times. The geyser made it cold and damp, and the noise drowned out conversation. Customers stopped coming, and the Whistler's Whirlpool was eventually abandoned.
